type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels

comments.comment: Catalyst Area Venting

type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels

comments.comment: Catalyst is removed from the process and treated to restore activity. The catalyst is rinsed with Shellsol then dried under nitrogen. This is a batch operation that is performed as required to maintain performance. 10 VOC emissions from the catalyst stack are estimated using the known flow rate of nitrogen through the system along with the vapour pressure of Shellsol at process conditions. Total stack emissions are estimated at 0.04 MTPY.
